output.summary: Revision 11 QA pass. All 4 developer fixes verified passing — 2 via code review + live computed style, 2 via live scroll/keyboard browser testing. All regression checks from previous cycles continue to pass. No open issues.

validation.buildLint: PASS — 0 errors, 9 warnings (all pre-existing in unrelated blocks)
validation.sync: PASS — 1 pre-existing structural warning for HeaderMain TSX shell vs PHP full output (known dynamic block pattern, not a regression)

fix1_whitespacNowrap.detail: whitespace-nowrap present in ThemeLink className. Also confirmed live: computed whitespace=nowrap on focused sub-item <a> element (screenshot 2026-02-18-153659).

fix2_rightAlignedOffset.detail: Conditional class output: submenuAlignment==='right' adds 'md:right-0 md:-mr-6' alongside existing right-aligned positioning. Left-aligned items get 'md:left-0' unchanged.

fix3_outlineDashed.detail: focus-visible:outline-dashed replaces focus-visible:outline-solid on all three elements.

liveEvidence.navButton: Screenshot 2026-02-18-153514: TAG=BUTTON, hasMenuItemBtn=true, focusVisible=true, outline-style=dashed, outline-color=rgb(255,255,255), outline-width=2px, outline-offset=2px, color=rgb(212,255,69). White dashed rectangle visually confirmed on ABOUT button.
liveEvidence.subItemLink: Screenshot 2026-02-18-153659: TAG=A, text=Who We Are, focusVisible=true, outline-style=dashed, outline-color=rgb(255,255,255). White dashed rectangle visually confirmed on WHO WE ARE sub-item.

files: blocks/Header/HeaderMain/HeaderMain.js lines 32-34 (spacer acquisition), 115-118 (set height on scroll), 164-167 (reset height)
fix4_spacer.detail: Spacer is a sibling div after .header-main. JS acquires it via header.nextElementSibling if classList contains header-main-spacer. Sets spacer.style.height = header.offsetHeight + 'px' when scrolling class is first added. Resets to '0' when scrolling class is removed.

liveEvidence.preScroll: Screenshot 2026-02-18-153554: header.scrolling=false, spacer found=true, spacer class=header-main-spacer h-0, spacer height=0 (unset), header offsetHeight=133px.
liveEvidence.postScroll: Screenshot 2026-02-18-153615 (scrollY=600): header.scrolling=true, header computed position=fixed, spacer style.height=133px, spacer computed height=133px. Matches expected 133px. Content flows without gap beneath fixed header.
liveEvidence.reset: Screenshot 2026-02-18-153636 (scrollY=0): header.scrolling=false, header computed position=static, spacer style.height=0px, spacer computed height=0px. Correctly reset.

FQA001_arrowDownIntoDropdown.evidence: Screenshot 2026-02-18-153659: TAB x6 + ArrowDown → TAG=A, text=Who We Are, focusVisible=true. First sub-item <a> receives focus.

FQA002_arrowUpIntoDropdown.evidence: Screenshot 2026-02-18-153703: ArrowUp → TAG=A, text=Work at Ignite, aria-expanded=n/a. Last sub-item <a> receives focus.

escape_closesDropdown.evidence: Screenshot 2026-02-18-153728: focus=About, btn aria-expanded=false, submenu hidden=true. White dashed outline on ABOUT button.

CUSTOM011_tabClosesDropdown.evidence: Screenshot 2026-02-18-153731: focus=Health, btn aria-expanded=false, submenu hidden=true. White dashed outline on HEALTH button.

FQA003_ariaLabelOnMenubar.note: Unchanged since revision 9. aria-label=Main navigation on ul[role=menubar] in HeaderMain.php line 150.

FQA004_ariaOrientationOnMenubar.note: Unchanged since revision 9. aria-orientation=horizontal on ul[role=menubar] in HeaderMain.php line 150.

FQA005_outlineOverridesGlobal.note: Unchanged since revision 11. body.css *:focus-visible in @layer base. Tailwind utilities override it. Global default still applies to elements without explicit overrides.

focusVisibleTextAccent.evidence: color=rgb(212,255,69) on all tested elements with focusVisible=true.

minWidthMaxRemoved.note: Unchanged since revision 10. md:min-w-max absent from HeaderMainItem.php submenu div.
